column1: ## Controls how TAG7 narrative sections feed into BOQ descriptions

column3: Use TAG7 Section A (Identity) for asset name in BOQ description
Use TAG7 Section E (Technical) for specifications in BOQ description
Use TAG7 Section C (Spatial) to append location context
Use TAG7 Section D (Lifecycle) for status/revision
Fall back to FamilyName - TypeName when TAG7 is empty
Include material name from element type compound structure
Description style: NRM2 (standard) or NARRATIVE (TAG7 natural language)
